title: Extract fir file from a verilog project
body:
## Issue
Hello,
I am trying to export firrtl from a verilog project. 

Im using the command write_firrtl and it executes without error, but when I try to use the generated .fir file, to another tool, which takes as input only .fir files, it can not parse it .

Maybe Im doing some step wrong on generating the fir file :

The project which I work, has several files and the top level.  I created a script like this : 

`read_verilog-formal /home/mustafa/Downloads/yosys/tests/Aes128/half_adder.v `
`read_verilog -formal /home/mustafa/Downloads/yosys/tests/Aes128/full_adder.v`
`read_verilog -formal /home/mustafa/Downloads/yosys/tests/Aes128/ripple_adder_4bit.v`
`read_verilog -formal /home/mustafa/Downloads/yosys/tests/Aes128/ripple_adder_6bit.v`
`read_verilog -formal /home/mustafa/Downloads/yosys/tests/Aes128/ripple_adder_8bit.v`
`read_verilog -formal /home/mustafa/Downloads/yosys/tests/Aes128/ripple_adder_12bit.v`
`read_verilog -formal /home/mustafa/Downloads/yosys/tests/Aes128/vedic2x2.v`
`read_verilog -formal /home/mustafa/Downloads/yosys/tests/Aes128/vedic4x4.v`
`read_verilog -formal /home/mustafa/Downloads/yosys/tests/Aes128/vedic8x8.v`
`hierarchy -top vedic8x8`
`proc`
`opt`
`write_firrtl vedic8x8r.fir `


So on this case the top level module is vedi8x8.v
Am I missing something  by doing like this ?
Thank you
